name: docs-lookup
description: Fetches live library documentation from official sources — eliminates hallucinations about API signatures and usage
author: Kimi Plugin Community

interface.shortDescription: Live library documentation lookup — reduces hallucinations on API usage
interface.longDescription:
Docs Lookup helps Kimi fetch accurate, up-to-date library documentation from official sources.

Features:
- Automatically fetches docs when you ask about a library's API
- Version-aware: specify which library version to look up
- Covers npm, PyPI, Go, Rust, and most major ecosystems
- Reduces hallucinations: Kimi reads real docs instead of guessing

Usage examples:
- "How do I use the new React 19 use() hook?"
- "What's the correct signature for Next.js 15 generateStaticParams?"
- "Show me how to use Pydantic v2 Field validators"

skillInstructions: When answering questions about library usage, always check if the official documentation should be fetched first. Prioritise official sources (npm, PyPI, crates.io, pkg.go.dev, readthedocs) over memory.
